name: @corkprotocol/mcp-monorepo
description: Monorepo foundation for the Cork Protocol Model Context Protocol server and canonical operation packages.

scripts.check:runtime: node --input-type=module -e "const major = Number.parseInt(process.versions.node.split('.')[0], 10); if (major !== 22) { console.error('Node.js 22.x is required; received ' + process.versions.node); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces --if-present && rimraf coverage dist build .turbo
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:boundaries
scripts.ci: npm run check:runtime && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test
